## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Validation

- [ ] `npm run lint`
- [ ] `npm test`
- [ ] `npm run build`
- [ ] E2E executed if flow/UI behavior changed

## Risk Review

- [ ] Auth/permissions impact reviewed
- [ ] Data migration impact reviewed (if schema changed)
- [ ] Backward compatibility checked

## Notes

Add rollout notes, known risks, or follow-up tasks.
